DOMAIN: customer_support
TASK: Under CCPA, I'm requesting deletion of all personal data for user ID USR-88901. However, before you do: (1) I'm an active contributor to 3 shared team workspaces — if you delete my data, what happens to the content I created in shared spaces? Other team members depend on those documents, (2) I have an API integration that processes data for 200 customers through my account — will deletion cascade to the customer data I processed? That data belongs to the customers, not me, (3) I'm a co-signer on our organization's billing account — will deletion affect the billing relationship? Our CFO will not be happy if the account gets suspended, (4) I have 14 open support tickets with your team — some contain PII in the descriptions but also contain debugging information needed to resolve platform bugs affecting other customers. I need you to outline exactly what WILL and WON'T be deleted, the impact on shared resources, and a timeline — before I confirm the deletion. I want to exercise my right but I don't want to nuke my team's work.
